flagged_messages.message_text: ROW-7047 (Received): 'So... you're in contempt for that'
flagged_messages.primary_reasoning: Contempt threat re: daycare payment obligation — thirteenth instance in arc. ADD-002: Sev-1 (recurring contempt category, paper tiger trajectory, no new sub-category). RF-04 pass (RF04-B018-P05) explicitly designated this as RF-05 primary. The 'So...' opening with the ellipsis conveys contemptuous matter-of-fact framing — presenting the contempt finding as obvious and foregone rather than as a warning. Context: daycare payment non-compliance. Pattern note: B-018 follows immediately after the B-017 sole-custody filing threat (Aug 4-5) — the return to financial contempt threats within weeks of the custody escalation confirms that both financial-compliance and custody-elimination threats coexist in the arc.
flagged_messages.context_notes: RF04-B018-P05 noted ROW-7051-7055 as an adjacent cluster: 'why didn't you think to invite Olivia?' + 'You guys went to a festival and the movies. Why was there not a thought about your daughter?' — inadequate-father questioning deployed around the contempt threat. B-018 is predominantly cooperative (Olivia's staph recovery, school prep, lemonade stand) punctuated by the Sep 5-6 bike incident (RF-04 primary: 'dumbass' 6th instance, 4th pregnancy weaponization) — no additional RF-05 content in those clusters.

arc_state_snapshot.note: ARC-RF05-001 ACTIVE. B-018 adds S-017: routine contempt threat (daycare payment). No new sub-categories. Arc continues at maintenance level following B-017's major Sev-2 escalation.

batch_observations.tone_assessment: B-018 (Aug-Sep 2024): Low-signal RF-05 batch. Single contempt threat (daycare). Following the major B-017 sole-custody escalation, the arc returns to Sev-1 maintenance level. The ROW-6819 coaching admission in this batch (RF-04 primary) is significant for RF-01 cross-reference but does not affect RF-05 analysis.
batch_observations.cross_rf_context: RF-04 B-018: Two primaries — Aug 20-21 inadequate-father cluster (ROW-6783-6831, coaching admission ROW-6819) + Sep 5-6 bike incident ('dumbass' 6th, 4th pregnancy weaponization ROW-6971/6976). No RF-04 compound in B-018. RF-05 is peripheral aggressive-tone only in those clusters.
